calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-302 suffering-derivative comparator agent-loop integration diagnostic
items.note: 4-arm agent-loop integration diagnostic. ARM_0=comparator OFF backward-compat, ARM_1=event fires via pre-triggered buffer, ARM_2=valence write fires, ARM_3=flat signal no false fires. Companion to V3-EXQ-515 (comparator logic, PASS 2026-05-04). Non-trainable; ~1 min. Dry-run 8/8 PASS 2026-05-04.
